title: வெல்ல நினை (Think to Win - Supplementary) - மாதிரித் தேர்வு
subject: english

questions.question: What was the sequence of runners in the relay team? / தொடர் ஓட்ட அணியில் ஓட்டப்பந்தய வீரர்களின் வரிசை என்ன?
questions.explanation: The baton was passed from Shabnam to Neelam, then to Aruna, and finally to Rucha as the anchor runner.

questions.question: What does the word 'Wobbled' mean in the context of Rucha's cycling? / ருச்சாவின் மிதிவண்டிப் பயணத்தில் 'Wobbled' என்ற சொல்லின் பொருள் என்ன?
options: b) To move unsteadily from side to side
d) To jump over an obstacle
questions.answer: b) To move unsteadily from side to side
questions.explanation: Rucha felt the bicycle was unsteady because she lacked confidence while learning.

questions.question: Which game is the 'Odd one out' among Badminton, Table Tennis, Squash, and Cycling? / பேட்மிண்டன், டேபிள் டென்னிஸ், ஸ்குவாஷ் மற்றும் சைக்கிள் ஓட்டுதல் ஆகியவற்றில் வேறுபட்டது எது?
questions.explanation: Badminton, Table Tennis, and Squash are racket sports played on a court, while cycling is different.

questions.question: How much younger is Seema than Rucha? / சீமா, ருச்சாவை விட எத்தனை வயது இளையவர்?
questions.explanation: Seema is Rucha’s younger sister by three years.

questions.question: Identify the meaning of the word 'Abreast'. / 'Abreast' என்ற சொல்லின் பொருளைக் கண்டறிக.
questions.explanation: Running 'abreast' means the competitors are side by side.

questions.question: Teamwork is defined as Together Everyone Achieves ______.
questions.explanation: TEAM stands for Together Everyone Achieves More.

questions.question: Why was the runner from Team A called 'P.T. Usha'? / டீம் A-வைச் சேர்ந்த வீரர் ஏன் 'பி.டி. உஷா' என்று அழைக்கப்பட்டார்?
questions.explanation: She was nicknamed after the legend P.T. Usha because of her incredible speed.

questions.question: What was the name of the school the girls belonged to? / சிறுமிகள் படிக்கும் பள்ளியின் பெயர் என்ன?
questions.explanation: Springfields is the name of their school.

questions.question: Choose the synonym for 'Joviality'. / 'Joviality' என்பதன் பொருள் யாது?
questions.explanation: Joviality refers to the quality of being cheerful and friendly.

questions.question: Complete the logic: 10 'S' represents ______.
questions.explanation: Ten 'S' stands for the sport 'Ten-nis'.

questions.question: Rucha was 'Overprotected'. Which part of speech is this word? / 'Overprotected' - இது எந்த வகைச் சொல்?
questions.explanation: It describes Rucha's character, so it is an adjective.

questions.question: What was the turning point for Rucha's confidence? / ருச்சாவின் தன்னம்பிக்கையில் திருப்புமுனையாக அமைந்தது எது?
options: b) Prakash Sir’s 'Think to Win' mantra
questions.answer: b) Prakash Sir’s 'Think to Win' mantra
questions.explanation: The coach's motivation changed her mindset from doubting to winning.

questions.question: Choose the word that means 'Feeling sorry or regretful'. / 'வருத்தம் அல்லது வருந்துதல்' என்ற பொருள் தரும் சொல் எது?
questions.explanation: Remorsefully means feeling deep regret.

questions.question: What does 'Inter-school' competition mean? / 'Inter-school' போட்டி என்பது எதைக் குறிக்கும்?
questions.explanation: 'Inter-' means between, so it refers to competitions involving multiple schools.

questions.question: Which is NOT part of the TEAM acronym? / TEAM என்ற சுருக்கப் பெயரில் இடம் பெறாத பண்பு எது?
questions.explanation: Teamwork requires working together; selfishness is the opposite.

questions.question: How long had Vishnu been teaching Rucha to ride a bicycle? / விஷ்ணு எத்தனை நாட்களாக ருச்சாவிற்கு சைக்கிள் ஓட்டக் கற்றுக்கொடுத்தார்?
questions.explanation: The text specifies it was for two weeks.

questions.question: 'I will fall!' - Who said this? / 'நான் விழுந்துவிடுவேன்!' - என்று கூறியவர் யார்?
questions.explanation: Rucha was hesitant and feared falling even when balanced.

questions.question: Find the odd one out: Carrom, Chess, Table Tennis, Polo.
questions.explanation: Polo is an outdoor sport played on horseback, while others are indoor games.

questions.question: What is the meaning of 'Nimble'? / 'Nimble' என்பதன் பொருள் என்ன?
options: c) Quick and light in movement
questions.answer: c) Quick and light in movement
questions.explanation: Being nimble means being quick and light.

questions.question: Who is the protagonist of the story 'Think to Win'?
questions.explanation: The story centers around Rucha's journey.

questions.question: 'You are simply superb!' - Who said this to Rucha? / 'நீங்கள் மிகவும் அற்புதம்!' - என்று ருச்சாவிடம் கூறியவர் யார்?
options: c) The opponent from Team A
questions.answer: c) The opponent from Team A
questions.explanation: The fast runner from the rival team congratulated Rucha.

questions.question: Identify the correct spelling of the sport. / விளையாட்டின் சரியான எழுத்துக்கூட்டலைக் கண்டறிக.
questions.explanation: Triathlon is the correct standard spelling.

questions.question: What is the antonym of 'Enthusiastic'? / 'Enthusiastic' என்பதன் எதிர்ச்சொல் என்ன?
questions.explanation: Enthusiastic means eager; indifferent means uninterested.

questions.question: During the relay, what did Rucha focus on to win? / ஓட்டப்பந்தயத்தின் போது ருச்சா எதில் கவனம் செலுத்தினார்?
questions.explanation: She focused only on the finish line and her coach's words.

questions.question: Which character is described as a 'bold risk-taker'? / 'துணிச்சலான முடிவுகளை எடுப்பவர்' என்று யாரைக் குறிப்பிடலாம்?
questions.explanation: Seema is the more courageous and adventurous sister.

questions.question: What does 'Assent' mean? / 'Assent' என்பதன் பொருள் என்ன?
questions.explanation: Assent means to agree or approve.

questions.question: Which trait helps a team adjust to changing needs? / ஒரு குழு மாறக்கூடியச் சூழலுக்கு ஏற்பத் தன்னை மாற்றிக்கொள்ள உதவும் பண்பு எது?
questions.explanation: Adaptability helps teams adjust to new conditions.

questions.question: What was Rucha's final realization? / ருச்சாவின் இறுதியான புரிதல் என்ன?
options: b) She could win by overcoming hesitation
questions.answer: b) She could win by overcoming hesitation
questions.explanation: The story ends with Rucha conquering her self-doubt.

questions.question: 'Pitched against' means: / 'Pitched against' என்பதன் பொருள்?
options: b) Set to compete against someone
questions.answer: b) Set to compete against someone
questions.explanation: It means being matched to compete.

questions.question: What type of story is 'Think to Win'?
questions.explanation: The story inspires self-confidence and a positive mindset.

questions.question: Identify the verb: 'The girls practiced hard for the relay'.
questions.explanation: 'Practiced' is the action word.

questions.question: In the Wuzzle 'Ball under a Foot', what is the sport?
questions.explanation: A foot on a ball literally represents 'Football'.

questions.question: What was the name of the girl Rucha overtook in the final? / ருச்சா இறுதியில் யாரை முந்திச் சென்றார்?
options: c) The fast runner from Team A
questions.answer: c) The fast runner from Team A
questions.explanation: Rucha overtaken the fastest girl from the rival team.

questions.question: Choose the collective noun: A _______ of athletes.
questions.explanation: Athletes working together are called a 'Team'.

questions.question: Why did Rucha lose a badminton match earlier?
questions.explanation: Her main conflict was lack of confidence.

questions.question: What is the opposite of 'Nimble'?
questions.explanation: Clumsy is the opposite of being nimble.

questions.question: 'Think to Win' - acts as a ______ for the team.
questions.explanation: It is the motivational slogan of the coach.

questions.question: What was Seema's role in the story?
questions.explanation: Seema is Rucha's younger and bolder sister.

questions.question: What is 'Together Everyone Achieves More' acronym for?
questions.explanation: T.E.A.M stands for Together Everyone Achieves More.

questions.question: What is the main moral of the story?
options: b) Believe in yourself and have a positive mindset
questions.answer: b) Believe in yourself and have a positive mindset
questions.explanation: Self-confidence is key to success.
